General.Name: Nabaltec AG
General.Description: Nabaltec AG develops, manufactures, and distributes specialized products based on aluminum hydroxide and aluminum oxide in Germany, rest of Europe, the United States, and internationally. It operates in two segments, Functional Fillers and Specialty Oxides. The Functional Fillers segment manufactures and distributes non-halogenated flame-retardant fillers for the plastics and cable industries, as well as additives. Its Specialty Oxide segment offers ceramic materials and ceramic bodies for applications in technical ceramics and the refractory industry. The company was incorporated in 1994 and is headquartered in Schwandorf, Germany.
